books.strategy: Paper-only probability deltas where Mosaic evidence and Murmurs belief diverge from market-implied odds.
Paper-only liquid crypto momentum/reversion signals from public market and perception feeds.
Paper-only watchlist for public-company, macro, and regulatory signals; no brokerage execution.
Paper-only Seattle/Bellevue/Redmond and Washington State event-risk theses.
Paper-only AI, security, breach, and agent-tooling hype/fact deltas.

field_naming.scope: local append-only records and VM API payloads
field_naming.ui_boundary: SWA JavaScript may adapt to camelCase internally, but persisted loop records stay snake_case.

loop_topology.rule: Mosaic and Murmurs are the two primary owned loops; Bridge, paper, narrative, memory_sync, and source_health are supporting loops.

notes: Paper-only ledger for Mosaic & Murmurs morning briefs. Empty positions mean no simulated exposure and no buy/sell execution.
